questions.q: During finals week in May 2026, which popular educational platform was hacked by the group ShinyHunters, leaving university students stranded?
In May 2026, a federal judge ruled that the termination of humanities grants by which government entity was unconstitutional and 'troubling'?
In May 2026, Mohamed Sabry Soliman was sentenced to life in prison for a 2025 firebombing attack on a demonstration in which US state?
Starting May 8, 2026, the U.S. State Department announced it will proactively start revoking passports for thousands of parents who owe significant amounts of what?
In May 2026, Clarence Thomas hit a historic milestone on the Supreme Court by becoming what?
options: The justice with the most majority opinions
The first justice to serve 40 years
